description: Create a new facility report for 'Central Valley Ag Supply' in Tier2 Submit 2025. Set the Reporting Year to 2025 and Max Number of Occupants to 27. In the Contacts section, add an Emergency Contact named 'Sarah Jenkins' with the 24-Hour Phone '559-555-0288'. In the Chemical Inventory section, add 'Ammonium Nitrate' (CAS 6484-52-2). Set the Number of Days On Site to 94 and the Average Daily Amount to 853 lbs. Save the submission file to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\agri_depot_2025.t2s.
